steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject is “Many of whom,” which is plural (many = more than one). The phrase “like neuroscience and biophysics expert Elba Serrano” is just an example, not part of the subject.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A plural subject requires the plural verb form. Study is plural (the form used with I/you/we/they in present tense). Has studied, studies, and is studying are singular forms. That matches choice A — A is correct.
